import { codeAnchor, ref } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// A code anchor carrying a test: id — a static id, but outside the slot's namespaces
// (impl · api · component), so the graph is never keyed on it: extract/invalid-id.
export const wrongNamespaceAnchor = codeAnchor({
  id: "test:orders.smuggled-into-code-anchor",
  satisfies: ref("spec:orders.anything"),
});
